title: Oracle WebLogic JDBC Data Source Configuration
description: Schema for WebLogic Server JDBC system resource and data source configuration as managed through the RESTful Management API.

targets.description: Deployment targets for this data source

descriptorFileName.description: Name of the JDBC descriptor XML file

jdbcResource.description: JDBC resource configuration containing data source parameters and driver settings

jdbcDataSourceParams.description: Data source parameters including JNDI names and transaction settings

JNDINames.description: JNDI names bound to this data source for application lookup

globalTransactionsProtocol.description: Protocol used for participating in global (XA) transactions

rowPrefetch.description: Whether to enable row prefetching for improved performance

jdbcDriverParams.description: JDBC driver configuration including class name, URL, and connection properties

driverName.description: Fully qualified JDBC driver class name (e.g., oracle.jdbc.OracleDriver)

password.description: Database password (stored encrypted in WebLogic configuration)

useXaDataSourceInterface.description: Whether to use the XA data source interface

initialCapacity.description: Number of physical database connections to create at pool initialization

maxCapacity.description: Maximum number of physical database connections in the pool

minCapacity.description: Minimum number of physical connections maintained in the pool

capacityIncrement.description: Number of connections created when demand exceeds supply

testConnectionsOnReserve.description: Whether to test connections when they are reserved from the pool

testTableName.description: Table name or SQL query used to test connections (e.g., 'SQL ISVALID')

testFrequencySeconds.description: Seconds between connection pool health tests

shrinkFrequencySeconds.description: Seconds between attempts to shrink the pool

connectionCreationRetryFrequencySeconds.description: Seconds between retries when connection creation fails

connectionReserveTimeoutSeconds.description: Maximum seconds to wait for a connection from the pool

inactiveConnectionTimeoutSeconds.description: Seconds before an inactive connection is reclaimed

statementCacheSize.description: Number of prepared/callable statements cached per connection

removeInfectedConnections.description: Whether to remove connections that have been involved in errors

secondsToTrustAnIdlePoolConnection.description: Seconds a connection can remain idle and still be trusted

property.description: Key-value property for JDBC driver configuration
